# UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES - Periodic Transaction Report

Name: Rohit Khanna. Office telephone: 202-225-2631. Filer status: Member of the U.S. House of Representatives, State: CA, District: 17. Report type: Initial Report checked; Amendment not checked. The transaction grid on the cover contains only the greyed example row and blank rows; no real transaction rows are entered on this page.

uncertainties.read: Initial Report checked; Amendment not checked
uncertainties.note: cover is degraded but the initial report box is visibly marked and no amended-report date is entered
